'''Asdroni''' was the largest of the three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of the planet [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]] in the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]] which housed the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] attended by [[Jagged Fel]].

Larger than either the inner [[Rhigar's forested moon|forest moon]] or [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-covered [[Rhigar 3]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] beyond it, Asdroni loomed pale in the planet's night sky. Nothing is known for sure about its climate, however, and in contrast with its companions, it may have been airless.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} {{1st}}
